name: awesome-ascend-skills
description: A comprehensive knowledge base for Huawei Ascend NPU development, structured as distributed AI Agent Skills. Includes npu-smi device management, HCCL performance testing, and ATC model conversion.

plugins.name: npu-smi
plugins.description: Huawei Ascend NPU npu-smi command reference. Use for device queries (health, temperature, power, memory, processes, ECC), configuration (thresholds, modes, fan), firmware upgrades (MCU, bootloader, VRD), virtualization (vNPU), and certificate management.

plugins.name: hccl-test
plugins.description: HCCL (Huawei Collective Communication Library) performance testing for Ascend NPU clusters. Use for testing distributed communication bandwidth, verifying HCCL functionality, and benchmarking collective operations like AllReduce, AllGather, AlltoAll.

plugins.name: atc-model-converter
plugins.description: Complete toolkit for Huawei Ascend NPU model conversion and inference. Convert ONNX models to .om format using ATC tool, run Python inference on OM models using ais_bench, compare precision between CPU ONNX and NPU OM outputs, and end-to-end YOLO inference with Ultralytics.

plugins.name: ascend-docker
plugins.description: Create Docker containers for Huawei Ascend NPU development with proper device mappings (davinci_manager, devmm_svm, hisi_hdc) and volume mounts (driver, sbin, home). Use when setting up Ascend development environments in Docker, running CANN applications in containers, or creating isolated NPU development workspaces.

plugins.name: msmodelslim
plugins.description: Huawei Ascend NPU model compression tool for LLM, MoE, and multimodal models. Supports W4A8, W8A8, W8A8S, W8A16, W8A8C8 quantization and sparse quantization. Compatible with 20+ model families (Qwen, DeepSeek, LLaMA, GLM, Kimi, Baichuan, Yi, InternLM, Mistral, etc.). Includes precision auto-tuning, custom model integration guide, and vLLM-Ascend/MindIE deployment.

plugins.name: ais-bench
plugins.description: AI model evaluation tool for Ascend NPU. Supports accuracy evaluation (text, multimodal datasets), performance evaluation (latency, throughput, stress testing), vLLM/Triton inference, 15+ benchmarks (MMLU, GSM8K, MMMU, BFCL), multi-turn dialogue, Function Call, and custom datasets.

plugins.name: ascendc
plugins.description: AscendC development helper, provides AscendC development environment, compiler, and debugger. Supports C/C++ and Python programming on Ascend NPU. Includes sample code, tutorials, and best practices for AscendC development.

plugins.name: vllm-ascend
plugins.description: vLLM inference engine for Huawei Ascend NPU. Deploy LLMs with OpenAI-compatible API, offline batch inference, quantized model serving (W4A8, W8A8), tensor/pipeline parallelism for distributed inference, and performance optimization. Supports Qwen, DeepSeek, GLM, LLaMA models with Ascend-optimized kernels.

plugins.name: torch_npu
plugins.description: 华为昇腾 Ascend Extension for PyTorch (torch_npu) 的环境检查、部署与能力指引。在用户使用 @torch_npu、昇腾 NPU、CANN、或需要将 PyTorch 迁移到 NPU 时自动应用；当用户使用 @torch_npu_doc 时，基于 skill 的 reference 文档提供项目内中文文档能力说明。

plugins.name: diffusers-ascend-env-setup
plugins.description: HuggingFace Diffusers 环境配置指南，用于华为昇腾 NPU。覆盖 CANN 版本检测、PyTorch + torch_npu 安装、Diffusers 库安装及环境验证。当用户需要在昇腾 NPU 上配置 Diffusers 环境时使用。

plugins.name: ascend-opplugin
plugins.description: Installs op-plugin (torch_npu operator plugin) environment and guides custom NPU operator integration with PyTorch via two generic patterns (no workspace vs workspace+tiling), from kernel implementation through host registration, build, and test.

plugins.name: mindspeed-llm-skills
plugins.description: MindSpeed-LLM skill set for Huawei Ascend NPU, covering the full training pipeline: environment setup, data preprocessing, weight conversion, distributed training, and end-to-end orchestration. Use when deploying MindSpeed-LLM training on Ascend NPU.

plugins.name: diffusers-ascend-skills
plugins.description: Diffusers 昇腾 NPU 技能集，包括环境配置、权重准备、Pipeline 推理等。当用户需要在昇腾 NPU 上运行 Diffusers 推理时使用。

plugins.name: training-mfu-calculator
plugins.description: 大模型训练 MFU (Model FLOPs Utilization) 计算工具。支持 Dense 和 MoE 模型，GQA 和 SwiGLU FFN。包含 NVIDIA GPU 和 Ascend NPU 硬件峰值 FLOPS 参考，默认使用 Ascend910B2 (353 TFLOPS)。提供详细的 FLOPs 分析和性能报告。

plugins.name: github-issue-summary
plugins.description: Analyze closed GitHub issues to create troubleshooting case studies with root cause analysis and lessons learned. Use when summarizing resolved issue troubleshooting process, creating issue case studies, documenting problem-solving methodology, extracting lessons from closed issues, or building knowledge base from issue history.

plugins.name: profiling-analysis
plugins.description: Profiling skill set for Huawei Ascend NPU performance analysis. Analyzes step_trace_time.csv files to identify hostbound, computing, and communication bottlenecks. Use when performing performance analysis and optimization on Ascend NPU.

plugins.name: external-mindstudio-skills
plugins.description:
从 mindstudio 同步的 Ascend 技能集，包含 5 个技能：
- ascend-profiler-db-explorer: 面向 Ascend PyTorch Profiler / msprof DB（如 ascend_pytorch_profiler*.db、msprof_*.db）的 SQL 分析技能。将自然语言问题（
- op-mfu-calculator: 计算算子（如 matmul/GEMM）的 MFU（Machine FLOP Utilization），并给出清晰的公式和推导过程。
- mindstudio_profiler_data_check: 当用户提供 MindStudio profiler 采集的性能数据（框架 profiler、msprof 命令行）时，对数据完整性、采集状态及关键配置进行校验，确保后续分析工具能正常运行。
- ... 等 2 个技能

plugins.name: external-gitcode-ascend-skills
plugins.description:
从 gitcode-ascend 同步的 Ascend 技能集，包含 7 个技能：
- vLLM-ascend_FAQ_Generator: 为 vLLM-ascend 项目构建自动化工作流，处理已关闭的Issue并生成Debug FAQ。Use when users want to process closed issues from v
- vector-triton-ascend-ops-optimizer: 昇腾（Ascend） NPU 上 Triton 算子深度性能优化技能（Skill），致力于实现用户要求的 Triton 算子性能提升。核心技术包括但不限于 Unified Buffer (UB) 容量
- ascend-inference-repos-copilot: 昇腾（Ascend）推理生态开源代码仓库智能问答专家旨在为 vLLM、vLLM-Ascend、MindIE-LLM、MindIE-SD、MindIE-Motor、MindIE-Turbo 以及 msM
- ... 等 4 个技能

plugins.name: wan-ascend-adaptation
plugins.description: Comprehensive guide for adapting Wan series video generation models (Wan2.2/2.1/1.3) and similar diffusion-based video frameworks to Huawei Ascend NPU.
